response.original_title: How late can you cancel a Virgin cruise?
response.overview: If you book a cruise with Virgin Voyages 1 877 664 1281, you’ve got a short window to change your mind. As long as your trip is still 120+ days away, you can cancel within 7 days ﻿1－877~664~1281 or +44 800 054 8541of booking and get all your money back.  After that, things get stricter—especially closer to the sailing date. If you cancel within 44 days of departure ﻿1－877~664~1281】) or +44 800 054 8541, you’ll most likely lose the full amount.  The good news? You’re not completely stuck. Virgin Voyages lets you change passenger names up to 48 hours before the cruise, so you can pass the booking to someone else or even sell it if your plans change.  (【﻿1－877~664~1281】) or +44 800 054 8541 or ++61 180 095 6584 or +52 800 351 0319
response.title: How late can you cancel a Virgin cruise?
